metadata.description: Log Analytics workspace name for Microsoft Sentinel

properties.displayName: Ransomware Indicator - Volume Shadow Copy Deletion
properties.description: Detects deletion of Volume Shadow Copies via vssadmin or WMI, a common ransomware pre-encryption technique. MITRE ATT&CK: T1490 - Inhibit System Recovery.
properties.query:
let vss_commands = dynamic(["vssadmin delete shadows", "vssadmin.exe delete shadows", "Win32_ShadowCopy"]);
SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4688
| where CommandLine has_any (vss_commands)
  or (CommandLine has "vssadmin" and CommandLine has "delete")
  or (CommandLine has "wmic" and CommandLine has "shadowcopy" and CommandLine has "delete")
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, CommandLine, ParentProcessName, ProcessId
| extend AccountName = tostring(split(Account, "\\")[1])
| extend HostName = tostring(split(Computer, ".")[0])

properties.displayName: Ransomware Indicator - Mass File Extension Change
properties.description: Detects mass file renaming operations adding suspicious extensions (.locked, .encrypted, .crypt, .enc), indicating potential ransomware encryption activity. MITRE ATT&CK: T1486 - Data Encrypted for Impact.
properties.query:
let suspicious_extensions = dynamic([".locked", ".encrypted", ".crypt", ".enc", ".crypted", ".locky", ".cerber", ".zepto", ".thor", ".zzzzz", ".aaa", ".xyz", ".bleep"]);
SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4663 or EventID == 4688
| where ObjectName has_any (suspicious_extensions)
  or CommandLine has "Rename-Item" and CommandLine has_any (suspicious_extensions)
| summarize RenameCount = count(), FilesSample = make_set(ObjectName, 10) by Computer, Account, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| where RenameCount > 10
| extend AccountName = tostring(split(Account, "\\")[1])
| extend HostName = tostring(split(Computer, ".")[0])

properties.displayName: Ransomware Indicator - Windows Recovery Disabled via BCDEdit
properties.description: Detects bcdedit commands that disable Windows recovery options, a common ransomware technique to prevent system restoration. MITRE ATT&CK: T1490 - Inhibit System Recovery.
properties.query:
SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4688
| where (CommandLine has "bcdedit" and CommandLine has "recoveryenabled" and CommandLine has "no")
  or (CommandLine has "bcdedit" and CommandLine has "bootstatuspolicy" and CommandLine has "ignoreallfailures")
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, CommandLine, ParentProcessName, ProcessId
| extend AccountName = tostring(split(Account, "\\")[1])
| extend HostName = tostring(split(Computer, ".")[0])

properties.description: Detects stopping of backup, database, and security services commonly targeted by ransomware before encryption. MITRE ATT&CK: T1489 - Service Stop.
properties.query:
let target_services = dynamic(["VSS", "wbengine", "MSSQLSERVER", "SQLAgent", "SQLBrowser", "MSSQL$", "MsDtsServer", "veeam", "backup"]);
Event
| where EventLog == "System"
| where EventID == 7036
| where RenderedDescription has "stopped" or RenderedDescription has "entered the stopped state"
| where RenderedDescription has_any (target_services)
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, RenderedDescription, EventID
| extend HostName = tostring(split(Computer, ".")[0])
| summarize StoppedServices = count(), ServiceList = make_set(RenderedDescription, 10) by Computer, HostName, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| where StoppedServices >= 2

properties.displayName: Ransomware Indicator - Ransom Note File Creation
properties.description: Detects creation of files with common ransom note naming patterns across multiple directories. MITRE ATT&CK: T1486 - Data Encrypted for Impact.
properties.query:
let ransom_note_patterns = dynamic(["README", "DECRYPT", "RECOVER", "RESTORE", "HOW_TO", "HELP_DECRYPT", "YOUR_FILES", "RANSOM", "PAYMENT", "UNLOCK"]);
SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4663
| where ObjectName has_any (ransom_note_patterns)
| where ObjectName endswith ".txt" or ObjectName endswith ".html" or ObjectName endswith ".hta"
| summarize NoteCount = count(), Locations = make_set(ObjectName, 20) by Computer, Account, bin(TimeGenerated, 10m)
| where NoteCount >= 2
| extend AccountName = tostring(split(Account, "\\")[1])
| extend HostName = tostring(split(Computer, ".")[0])

properties.displayName: Ransomware Attack Chain - Multiple Indicators Detected
properties.description: Correlates multiple ransomware indicators (VSS deletion + service stops + file changes + log clearing) on the same host within a short window. High-confidence ransomware detection. MITRE ATT&CK: T1486, T1490, T1489, T1070.
properties.query:
let vss_events = SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4688
| where CommandLine has "vssadmin" and CommandLine has "delete"
| summarize VSSTime = min(TimeGenerated) by Computer
| extend Indicator = "VSS_Deletion";
let bcdedit_events = SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4688
| where CommandLine has "bcdedit" and CommandLine has "recoveryenabled"
| summarize BCDTime = min(TimeGenerated) by Computer
| extend Indicator = "Recovery_Disabled";
let log_clear = SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 1102
| summarize ClearTime = min(TimeGenerated) by Computer
| extend Indicator = "Log_Cleared";
vss_events
| join kind=inner (bcdedit_events) on Computer
| join kind=leftouter (log_clear) on Computer
| where abs(datetime_diff('minute', VSSTime, BCDTime)) < 30
| project TimeGenerated = VSSTime, Computer, VSSTime, BCDTime, ClearTime
| extend HostName = tostring(split(Computer, ".")[0])
